title: rubus ostroviensis
intro: Rubus ostroviensis, also known as the Bulgarian black raspberry or Ostrov black raspberry, is a rare and endangered species of raspberry native to the Balkan Peninsula. Its medicinal properties include its high antioxidant content and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in treating digestive issues, fever, and various skin conditions. The health benefits of Rubus ostroviensis include its ability to protect against oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or jam, and is traditionally used in folk medicine in Bulgaria and other parts of Eastern Europe.
